title: Dungeons Sweet Berry Bush
description: Adds the sweet berry bush from Minecraft Dungeons.
body:
# Minecraft's unOfficial Dungeons Sweet Berry Bush
This resource pack adds the bushy sweet berry bush from Minecraft Dungeons. It is a part of the [Minecraft unOfficial Proyect](https://modrinth.com/collection/hB55ZXtF).

From the darkness of the premature cancelation, from the solitude of the forgotten assets, the greatest return since the arrival of the Copper Golem: The sweet berry bush from Minecraft dungeons. With his bushy texture, and his beautiful model, the newly and enhanced sweet berry bush promises... oh, come on it's just a model.
